newsSinceJun6: No material company-specific news since June 6. Today's -10.4% drop (EUR 156.45 -> 140.15) looks flow-driven: profit-taking on a parabolic +463% YTD AI-photonics re-rating, with sell-side Hold ratings and price targets sitting below the share price. Last fundamental datapoints predate the window: FY26 results (May 27) showed FCF EUR 63M vs ~EUR 6M consensus, Photonics-SOI crossing $100M earlier than expected (Morgan Stanley back-calculated ~$130M, +60-70%), but FY27 profitability flagged as pressured by low fab loading, FX and lower funding.

sources.label: Investing.com - Soitec shares surge 14% on FY26 cash flow beat and AI photonics growth
Investing.com - Why is Soitec stock down over 4% today? (profit-taking, analyst Holds below price)
Soitec - FY2026 full-year results press release
MarketScreener - Soitec: Plenty of light, but still little profit

verdicts.rankRationale: Yesterday's down already priced the post-rerating crowding; at rank 94 there is little residual penalty left, and today's -10.4% flush with the photonics/wafer thesis intact marginally improves asymmetry rather than worsening it.
verdicts.bull: Photonics-SOI crossed $100M ahead of plan and grew 60-70% per Morgan Stanley's back-calculation, validating Soitec as a real consumable input to AI optical interconnect; FCF beat shows the RF-SOI downcycle is being managed.
verdicts.neutral: Core RF-SOI and automotive remain deeply depressed (Mobile Comms -41%), so the AI wafer story is carrying a still-shrinking overall revenue base; rank near the bottom of the list already reflects that.
verdicts.bear: After +463% YTD the stock prices a flawless photonics S-curve while FY27 profitability is guided down on low fab loading, FX and lower public funding; a momentum break can compound fast.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Q1 FY27 revenue print (guided ~+15% YoY cc) and Photonics-SOI run-rate confirmation on July 29.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Photonics order timing slips while RF-SOI/auto inventory correction lingers, deflating the only growth leg supporting the re-rating.

verdicts.rankRationale: The 'hidden enabler' premise of this crowding-sensitive list is consumed: Morgan Stanley call-outs and retail photonics-monopoly write-ups made the substrate angle consensus, and yesterday's down already captured that; today's -10.4% no-news flush partially restores asymmetry, so hold with slight negative drift rather than a second consecutive down.
verdicts.bull: Soitec is effectively the merchant source of Photonics-SOI substrates for silicon photonics/CPO transceivers, a per-port consumable as optics attach rates rise; today's flush offers a slightly better entry into an intact structural thesis.
verdicts.neutral: Optionality is real but no longer hidden; at ~$6B cap and 463% YTD, the market already pays for the CPO substrate story, leaving rank 21 about right after yesterday's demotion.
verdicts.bear: A momentum unwind in a name where photonics is still a minority of revenue could overshoot down, and customer concentration plus the unresolved RF cycle mean the equity is far riskier than the substrate narrative implies.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: New Photonics-SOI capacity or design-win disclosures tied to CPO/optical interconnect ramps at major foundry customers.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Crowded positioning unwinding faster than fundamentals build - today's -10.4% on no news shows the flow sensitivity of a post-parabolic register.
